text:
Matthias Meyser wrote:
> Ðf you use the following commands on an unused atachannel you get an Fatal kernel Trap 12
> 
> atacontrol detach ata1
> atacontrol reinit ata1
> 
> testet with ata1 <AMD CS5536 UDMA100 controller> build in controller
> of a soekris net5501 an ata2/3/4/5 <Promise PDC40718 SATA300 controller>
> card in PCI slot.
> 
> btw. promise controller detects no disc. testet with 3 discs.

This problem fixed in CURRENT and can be MFCed (cvs rev. 1.288).
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=122045
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=127250
